=Index of values=

|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="__link"| value Comet.__link >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Comet >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\A|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="account_not_activated"| value User.account_not_activated >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Reference used to remember if the account is activated~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="action_link_handler"| value Handlers.action_link_handler >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Handlers >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|action~_link~_handler userid~_o activation~_key ~(~)>> is the handler for
    activation keys~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="action_link_key_created"| value Msg.action_link_key_created >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Msg >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Set to <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|true>> if an action link key has been already created and sent to the
    user email~, else <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|false>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="action_link_key_outdated"| value User.action_link_key_outdated >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Reference used to remember if an action link key is outdated~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="action_link_service"| value Services.action_link_service >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Services >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A ~G~E~T service for action link keys~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="add"| value Db.Phone.add >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db.Phone >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|add userid number>> associates <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|number>> with the user
      <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|userid>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="add_actionlinkkey"| value User.add_actionlinkkey >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|add~_actionlinkkey ~?autoconnect ~?action ~?data ~?validity ~?expiry ~~act~_key ~~userid
    ~~email ~(~)>> adds the action key in the database~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="add_actionlinkkey"| value Db.User.add_actionlinkkey >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db.User >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="add_actions"| value Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap.add_actions >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Add two buttons with an action ~(created with <<a_api subproject="server" | val Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap.Action.create >>~)~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="add_badge"| value Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap.add_badge >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Add a badge to the icon of the notification in the launcher~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="add_badge"| value Fcm_notif.Notification.Ios.add_badge >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Notification.Ios >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|add~_badge nb~_badge notification>> indicates the badge on the client
            app home icon~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="add_body"| value Fcm_notif.Notification.add_body >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Notification >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|add~_body body notification>> adds a body to the notification
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="add_click_action"| value Fcm_notif.Notification.add_click_action >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Notification >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|add~_click~_action activity notification>> adds an action when the user
        taps on the notification~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="add_collapse_key"| value Fcm_notif.Options.add_collapse_key >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Options >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|add~_collapse~_key collapse~_key options>> identifies a group of
        messages ~(e~.g~.~, with collapse~_key~: "~Updates ~Available"~) that can be
        collapsed~, so that only the last message gets sent when delivery can be
        resumed~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="add_color"| value Fcm_notif.Notification.Android.add_color >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Notification.Android >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|add~_color ~~red ~~green ~~blue notification>> indicates color of the icon~,
            expressed in ~#rrggbb format~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="add_condition"| value Fcm_notif.Options.add_condition >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Options >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|add~_condition condition options>> specifies a logical expression of
        conditions that determine the message target~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="add_content_available"| value Fcm_notif.Options.add_content_available >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Options >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|add~_content~_available value options>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="add_dry_run"| value Fcm_notif.Options.add_dry_run >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Options >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|add~_dry~_run value options>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="add_email_handler"| value Handlers.add_email_handler >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Handlers >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|add~_email~_handler ~(~) email>> adds a new e~-mail address
    for the current user and sends an activation link~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="add_email_service"| value Services.add_email_service >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Services >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A ~P~O~S~T service to add an email to a user~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="add_email_to_user"| value Db.User.add_email_to_user >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db.User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|add~_email~_to~_user ~~userid ~~email>> add <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|email>> to user with ~I~D <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|userid>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="add_icon"| value Fcm_notif.Notification.Android.add_icon >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Notification.Android >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|add~_icon icon notification>> indicates notification icon~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="add_image"| value Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap.add_image >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Add an image to the push notification in the notification area
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="add_info"| value Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap.add_info >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Add <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|content~-available~: ~1>> also
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="add_led_color"| value Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap.add_led_color >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Change the ~L~E~D color when the notification is received~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="add_message"| value Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap.add_message >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Add a message attribute to the notification
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="add_notification_channel_id"| value Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap.add_notification_channel_id >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="add_notification_id"| value Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap.add_notification_id >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Add a notification ~I~D~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="add_picture"| value Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap.add_picture >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Add a large picture in the notification ~(under the title and body~)~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="add_preregister"| value User.add_preregister >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|add~_preregister email>> adds an email into the preregister collections~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="add_preregister"| value Db.User.add_preregister >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db.User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|add~_preregister email>> preregisters <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|email>> in the database~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="add_priority"| value Fcm_notif.Options.add_priority >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Options >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|add~_priority priority options>> sets the priority of the message~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="add_priority"| value Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap.add_priority >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="add_raw_json"| value Fcm_notif.Options.add_raw_json >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Options >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|add~_raw~_json key content~_json data>>
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="add_raw_json"| value Fcm_notif.Data.add_raw_json >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Data >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|add~_raw~_json key content~_json data>>
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="add_raw_json"| value Fcm_notif.Notification.add_raw_json >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Notification >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|add~_raw~_json key content~_json notification>>
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="add_raw_string"| value Fcm_notif.Options.add_raw_string >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Options >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|add~_raw~_string key content data>>
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="add_raw_string"| value Fcm_notif.Data.add_raw_string >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Data >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|add~_raw~_string key content data>>
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="add_raw_string"| value Fcm_notif.Notification.add_raw_string >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Notification >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|add~_raw~_string key content notification>>
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="add_restricted_package_name"| value Fcm_notif.Options.add_restricted_package_name >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Options >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|add~_restricted~_package~_name package~_name options>> specifies the
        package name of the application where the registration tokens must match
        in order to receive the message~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="add_sound"| value Fcm_notif.Notification.add_sound >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Notification >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|add~_sound sound notification>> indicates a sound to play when the device
        receives a notification~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="add_soundname"| value Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap.add_soundname >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Add a soundame when the mobile receives the notification
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="add_style"| value Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap.add_style >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="add_summary_text"| value Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap.add_summary_text >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Add a summary text~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="add_tag"| value Fcm_notif.Notification.Android.add_tag >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Notification.Android >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|add~_tag tag notification>> indicates whether each notification
            results in a new entry in the notification drawer on ~Android~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="add_time_to_live"| value Fcm_notif.Options.add_time_to_live >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Options >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|add~_time~_to~_live time~_in~_seconds options>> specifies how long ~(in
        seconds~) the message should be kept in ~F~C~M storage if the device is
        offline~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="add_title"| value Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap.add_title >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Add a title attribute to the notification
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="add_title"| value Fcm_notif.Notification.add_title >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Notification >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|add~_title title notification>> adds a title to push notification in
        the notification area~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="add_to"| value Fcm_notif.Options.add_to >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Options >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|add~_to to options>> specifies the recipient of a message~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="add_user_in_group"| value Group.add_user_in_group >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Group >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|add~_user~_in~_group ~~group ~~userid>> adds the user with ~I~D <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|userid>> to
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|group>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="add_user_in_group"| value Db.Groups.add_user_in_group >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db.Groups >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|add~_user~_in~_group ~~groupid ~~userid>> adds the user with ~I~D <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|userid>> in the
      group with ~I~D <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|groupid>>
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="add_vibration_pattern"| value Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap.add_vibration_pattern >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Add a vibration pattern
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="add_visibility"| value Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap.add_visibility >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Add the visibility payload
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="all"| value User.all >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Get <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|limit>> ~(default~: ~1~0~) emails from the preregister collections~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="all"| value Group.all >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Group >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|all ~(~)>> returns all the groups of the database~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="all"| value Db.Groups.all >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db.Groups >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|all ~(~)>> returns all groups as list of tuple <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~(groupid~, name~,
      description~)>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="all"| value Db.User.all >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db.User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|all ~?limit ~(~)>> get all email addresses with a limit of <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|limit>> ~(default
      is ~1~0~)~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="available"| value Db.Email.available >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db.Email >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|available email>> returns <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|true>> if <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|email>> is not already used~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="avatar"| value User_view.avatar >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User_view >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|avatar user>> creates an image ~H~T~M~L tag ~(with ~Eliom~.~Content~.~H~T~M~L~.~F~) with an
    alt attribute to <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|"picture">> and with class <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|"os~-avatar">>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="avatar_of_user"| value User.avatar_of_user >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|avatar~_of~_user user>> returns the avatar of the user <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|user>> as <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Some
    avatar~_uri>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="avatar_uri_of_avatar"| value User.avatar_uri_of_avatar >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|avatar~_uri~_of~_avatar ~?absolute~_path avatar>> returns the ~U~R~I ~(absolute or
    relative~) depending on the value of <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|absolute~_path>>~) of the avatar
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|avatar>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="avatar_uri_of_user"| value User.avatar_uri_of_user >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|avatar~_uri~_of~_user user>> returns the avatar ~U~R~I ~(absolute or relative~)
    depending on the value of <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|absolute~_path>>~) of the avatar of the user <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|user>>~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\B|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="block"| value Tips.block >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Tips >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Return a box containing a tip~, to be inserted where you want in a page~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="bubble"| value Tips.bubble >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Tips >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Display tips in pages~, as a speech bubble~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\C|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="cache"| value User_proxy.cache >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User_proxy >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Cache keeping userid and user information as a <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Types~.user>> type~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="canonical_ids_of_t"| value Fcm_notif.Response.canonical_ids_of_t >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Response >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|canonical~_ids~_of~_t response>> returns the number of results that contain
        a canonical registration token~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="close"| value Icons.ICSIG.close >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Icons.ICSIG >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="confirm_code"| value Connect_phone.confirm_code >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Connect_phone >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Confirm validation code and add extra phone to account of the given
    user
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="confirm_code_extra"| value Connect_phone.confirm_code_extra >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Connect_phone >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Confirm validation code and add extra phone to account of the currently
    connected user
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="confirm_code_extra_handler"| value Handlers.confirm_code_extra_handler >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Handlers >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|confirm~_code~_extra~_handler ~(~) number>> is like
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|confirm~_code~_signup~_handler>> but for adding an additional number to
    the account~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="confirm_code_extra_service"| value Services.confirm_code_extra_service >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Services >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Confirm ~S~M~S activation code and ~(if valid~) add new phone number to
    user~'s account~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="confirm_code_recovery"| value Connect_phone.confirm_code_recovery >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Connect_phone >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Confirm validation code and recover account~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="confirm_code_recovery_handler"| value Handlers.confirm_code_recovery_handler >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Handlers >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|confirm~_code~_recovery~_handler ~(~) number>> is like
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|confirm~_code~_signup~_handler>> but for recovering a lost
    password~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="confirm_code_recovery_service"| value Services.confirm_code_recovery_service >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Services >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Confirm ~S~M~S activation code and ~(if valid~) allow the user to set a
    new password~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="confirm_code_remind_service"| value Services.confirm_code_remind_service >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Services >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Temporary alternate name for <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|confirm~_code~_recovery~_handler>> to
    facilite the transition~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="confirm_code_signup"| value Connect_phone.confirm_code_signup >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Connect_phone >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Confirm validation code and complete sign~-up with the phone
    number~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="confirm_code_signup_handler"| value Handlers.confirm_code_signup_handler >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Handlers >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|confirm~_code~_signup~_handler ~(~) ~(first~_name~, ~(last~_name~, ~(pass~,
    number~)~)~)>> sends a verification code to <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|number>>~, displays a popup
    for confirming the code~, and creates the account if all goes
    well~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="confirm_code_signup_no_connect"| value Connect_phone.confirm_code_signup_no_connect >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Connect_phone >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Confirm validation code and create corresponding user~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="confirm_code_signup_service"| value Services.confirm_code_signup_service >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Services >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Confirm ~S~M~S activation code and ~(if valid~) register new user~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="connect"| value Session.connect >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Session >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Close current session ~(if any~) by calling disconnect~,
    then open a new session for a user by setting a session group for the browser
    which initiated the current request~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="connect"| value Connect_phone.connect >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Connect_phone >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="connect_form"| value User_view.connect_form >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User_view >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|connect~_form ~?a ~?email ~(~)>> creates a ~P~O~S~T login form with email~, password~,
    a checkbox to stay logged in ~(with default text to <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|"keep me logged in">> in
    a span~) and a submit button~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="connect_handler"| value Handlers.connect_handler >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Handlers >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|connect~_handler ~(~) ~(~(login~, password~)~, keep~Me~Logged~In~)>> connects the user
    with <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|login>> and <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|password>> and keeps the user logged in between different
    session if <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|keep~Me~Logged~In>> is set to <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|true>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="connect_service"| value Services.connect_service >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Services >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A ~P~O~S~T service to connect a user with username and password~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="connected_fun"| value Session.Opt.connected_fun >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Session.Opt >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Same as <<a_api subproject="server" | val Session.Opt.connected_fun >> but instead of failing in case the user is
      not connected~, the function given as parameter takes an <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Types~.~User~.id
      option>> for user id~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="connected_fun"| value Session.connected_fun >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Session >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Wrapper for service handlers that fetches automatically connection
    information~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="connected_page"| value Page.Make.Opt.connected_page >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Page.Make.Opt >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Wrapper for pages that first checks if the user is connected~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="connected_page"| value Page.Make.connected_page >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Page.Make >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Wrapper for pages that first checks if the user is connected~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="connected_rpc"| value Session.Opt.connected_rpc >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Session.Opt >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Same as <<a_api subproject="server" | val Session.Opt.connected_rpc >> but instead of failing in case the user is
      not connected~, the function given as parameter takes an <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Types~.~User~.id
      option>> for user id~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="connected_rpc"| value Session.connected_rpc >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Session >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Wrapper for server functions ~(see <<a_api subproject="server" | val Session.connected_fun >>~)~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="connected_user_box"| value User_view.connected_user_box >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User_view >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~An userbox ~(in a div with the ~C~S~S class <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|"connected~-user~-box">>~) for connected
    users with an icon and the username~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="connected_wrapper"| value Session.connected_wrapper >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Session >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Wrapper for server functions when you do not need userid
    ~(see <<a_api subproject="server" | val Session.connected_fun >>~)~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="connection_box"| value User_view.connection_box >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User_view >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A box ~(in a div with the ~C~S~S class <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|"os~-connection~-box">>~) with a sign in and
    a sign out button~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="connection_pool"| value Core_db.connection_pool >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Core_db >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Direct access to the connection pool
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="content"| value Page.content >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Page >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Specifies a page with an optional title ~(with the argument <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~?title>>~)~, some
    optional extra metadata ~(with the argument <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~?head>>~) and a given body~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="create"| value User.create >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|create ~?password ~?avatar ~?language ~~firstname ~~lastname email>> creates a new user
    with the given information~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="create"| value Group.create >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Group >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|create ~~description name>> creates a new group in the database and returns
    it as a record of type <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Types~.~Group~.t>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="create"| value Fcm_notif.Options.create >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Options >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|create registered~_ids>> creates a new option where <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|registered~_ids>> is
        the ~I~D of mobile devices you want to send the notifications to~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="create"| value Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap.Action.create >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap.Action >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|create icon title callback foreground>>
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="create"| value Db.Groups.create >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db.Groups >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|create ~?description name>> creates a new group with name <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|name>> and with
      description <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|description>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="create"| value Db.User.create >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db.User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|create ~?password ~?avatar ~?language ~~firstname ~~lastname email>> creates a new user
      in the database and returns the userid of the new user~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="crop_image"| value Uploader.crop_image >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Uploader >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|crop~_image ~~src ~?dst ~?ratio ~~top ~~right ~~bottom ~~left>> crops the image
    saved in <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|src>> and saves the result in <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|dst>> ~(default is the source file~)~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="css"| value Page.PAGE.css >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Page.PAGE >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|css>> ~(same as <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|js>> but for style sheet files~)~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="css_class"| value Platform.css_class >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Platform >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Return <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|"os~-platform">> where <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|platform>> is the device platform~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\D|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="default_connected_error_page"| value Page.PAGE.default_connected_error_page >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Page.PAGE >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|default~_connected~_error~_page userid~_o get~_param post~_param exn>> is the
      default error page for connected pages~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="default_connected_predicate"| value Page.PAGE.default_connected_predicate >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Page.PAGE >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|default~_connected~_predicate userid~_o get~_param post~_param>> is the default
      predicate for connected pages~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="default_error_page"| value Page.PAGE.default_error_page >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Page.PAGE >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|default~_error~_page get~_param post~_param exn>> is the default error page~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="default_predicate"| value Page.PAGE.default_predicate >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Page.PAGE >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|default~_predicate get~_param post~_param>> is the default predicate~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="delete"| value Db.Phone.delete >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db.Phone >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|delete userid number>> deletes <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|number>>~, which has to be
      associated to <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|userid>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="desc_of_group"| value Group.desc_of_group >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Group >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|desc~_of~_group group>> returns the group description~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="disconnect"| value Session.disconnect >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Session >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Close a session by discarding server side states for current browser
    ~(session and session group~)~, current client process ~(tab~) and current
    request~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="disconnect_all"| value Session.disconnect_all >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Session >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Close all sessions of current user ~(or <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|userid>> if present~)~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="disconnect_all_link"| value User_view.disconnect_all_link >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User_view >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Link to disconnect all user sessions~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="disconnect_button"| value User_view.disconnect_button >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User_view >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|disconnect~_button ~?a ~(~)>> creates a disconnect ~P~O~S~T form with a button
    without value~, a signout icon and a text message <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|"logout">>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="disconnect_handler"| value Handlers.disconnect_handler >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Handlers >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|disconnect~_handler ~?main~_page ~(~) ~(~)>> disconnects the current user~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="disconnect_link"| value User_view.disconnect_link >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User_view >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A link to <<a_api subproject="server" | val Services.disconnect_service >>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="disconnect_service"| value Services.disconnect_service >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Services >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A ~P~O~S~T service to disconnect the current user~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\E|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="email_of_user"| value User.email_of_user >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|email~_of~_user user>> returns the main email of user <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|user>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="email_of_userid"| value User.email_of_userid >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|email~_of~_userid userid>> returns the main email of user with ~I~D
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|userid>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="email_of_userid"| value Db.User.email_of_userid >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db.User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|email~_of~_userid userid>> returns the main email registered for the user
      with ~I~D <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|userid>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="email_pattern"| value Email.email_pattern >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Email >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~The pattern used to check the validity of an e~-mail address~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="email_regexp"| value Lib.email_regexp >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Lib >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="emails_of_user"| value User.emails_of_user >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|emails~_of~_user user>> returns the emails list of user <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|user>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="emails_of_userid"| value User.emails_of_userid >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|emails~_of~_userid userid>> returns the emails list of user with ~I~D
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|userid>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="emails_of_userid"| value Db.User.emails_of_userid >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db.User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|emails~_of~_userid userid>> returns all emails registered for the user with
      ~I~D <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|userid>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="emails_of_userid_with_status"| value Db.User.emails_of_userid_with_status >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db.User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Like <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|emails~_of~_userid>>~, but also returns validation
      status~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="empty"| value Fcm_notif.Data.empty >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Data >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|empty ~(~)>> creates an empty data value~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="empty"| value Fcm_notif.Notification.empty >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Notification >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|empty ~(~)>> creates an empty notification
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="equal_key"| value Notif.ARG.equal_key >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Notif.ARG >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="exists"| value Db.Phone.exists >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db.Phone >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Does the number exist in the database~?
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\F|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="failure_of_t"| value Fcm_notif.Response.failure_of_t >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Response >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|failure~_of~_t response>> returns the number of messages that could not
        be processed~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="firstname_of_user"| value User.firstname_of_user >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|firstname~_of~_user user>> returns the first name of the user <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|user>>
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="forgot_password_form"| value User_view.forgot_password_form >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User_view >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|forgot~_password~_form ~~a ~(~)>> creates a <<a_api subproject="server" | val User_view.generic_email_form >> with the
    service <<a_api subproject="server" | val Services.forgot_password_service >>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="forgot_password_handler"| value Handlers.forgot_password_handler >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Handlers >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|forgot~_password~_handler service ~(~) email>> creates and sends an action link
    to <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|email>> if the user forgot his password and redirects to <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|service>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="forgot_password_service"| value Services.forgot_password_service >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Services >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A ~P~O~S~T service when the user forgot his password~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="full_transaction_block"| value Core_db.full_transaction_block >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Core_db >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|full~_transaction~_block f>> executes function <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|f>> within a database
    transaction~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="fullname_of_user"| value User.fullname_of_user >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Retrieve the full name of user ~(which is the concatenation of the first name
    and last name~)~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\G|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="generic_email_form"| value User_view.generic_email_form >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User_view >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|generic~_email~_form ~?a ~?label ~?text ~?email ~~service ~(~)>> creates an email
    ~P~O~S~T form with an input of type email and a submit button~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="get"| value Request_cache.Cache_sig.get >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Request_cache.Cache_sig >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Get the value corresponding to the given key~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="get_actionlinkkey_info"| value User.get_actionlinkkey_info >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Retrieve the data corresponding to an action link key~, each
    call decrements the validity of the key by <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~1>> if it exists and
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|validity ~> ~0>> ~(it remains at <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~0>> if it~'s already <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~0>>~)~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="get_actionlinkkey_info"| value Db.User.get_actionlinkkey_info >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db.User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|get~_actionlinkkey~_info key>> returns the information about the
      action link <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|key>> as a type <<a_api subproject="server" | type Types.Action_link_key.info >>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="get_current_user"| value Current_user.Opt.get_current_user >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Current_user.Opt >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|get~_current~_user ~(~)>> returns the current user as a <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Types~.~User~.t option>>
      type~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="get_current_user"| value Current_user.get_current_user >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Current_user >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|get~_current~_user ~(~)>> returns the current user as a <<a_api subproject="server" | type Types.User.t >> type~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="get_current_userid"| value Current_user.Opt.get_current_userid >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Current_user.Opt >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|get~_current~_userid ~(~)>> returns the ~I~D of the current user as an option~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="get_current_userid"| value Current_user.get_current_userid >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Current_user >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|get~_current~_userid ~(~)>> returns the ~I~D of the current user~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="get_data"| value User_proxy.get_data >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User_proxy >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|get~_data userid>> returns the user which has ~I~D <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|userid>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="get_data_from_cache"| value User_proxy.get_data_from_cache >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User_proxy >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|get~_data~_from~_cache userid>> returns the user with ~I~D <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|userid>> saved in
    cache~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="get_data_from_db"| value User_proxy.get_data_from_db >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User_proxy >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|get~_data~_from~_db myid~_o userid>> returns the user which has ~I~D <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|userid>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="get_data_from_db_for_client"| value User_proxy.get_data_from_db_for_client >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User_proxy >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|get~_data~_from~_db~_for~_client myid~_o userid>> returns the user which has ~I~D
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|userid>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="get_image_height"| value Uploader.get_image_height >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Uploader >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Return the height of the given image~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="get_image_width"| value Uploader.get_image_width >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Uploader >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Return the width of the given image~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="get_language"| value User.get_language >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|get~_language userid>> returns the language of the user with ~I~D <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|userid>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="get_language"| value Db.User.get_language >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db.User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|get~_language userid>> returns the language of the user with ~I~D <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|userid>>
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="get_list"| value Db.Phone.get_list >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db.Phone >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|get~_list userid>> returns the list of number associated to the
      user~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="get_mailer"| value Email.get_mailer >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Email >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|get~_mailer ~(~)>> returns the name of mailer program~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="get_users"| value User.get_users >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|get~_users ~?pattern ~(~)>> gets users who match the <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|pattern>> ~(useful for
    completion~)~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="get_users"| value Db.User.get_users >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db.User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|get~_users ~~pattern ~(~)>> returns all users matching the pattern <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|pattern>>
      as a tuple <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~(userid~, firstname~, lastname~, avatar~, bool~_password~,
      language~)>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="group_of_name"| value Group.group_of_name >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Group >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Overwrites the function <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|group~_of~_name>> of <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Db~.~Group>> and use
    the <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|get>> function of the cache module~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="group_of_name"| value Db.Groups.group_of_name >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db.Groups >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|group~_of~_name name>> returns a tuple <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~(groupid~, name~, description~)>>
      describing the group~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\H|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="has"| value Request_cache.Cache_sig.has >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Request_cache.Cache_sig >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Returns <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|true>> if the key has been stored into the cache~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="home_button"| value User_view.home_button >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User_view >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|home~_button ~~a ~(~)>> creates an input button with value "home" which
    redirects to the main service~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\I|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="id_of_group"| value Group.id_of_group >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Group >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|id~_of~_group group>> returns the group ~I~D~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="in_group"| value Group.in_group >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Group >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|in~_group ~~group ~~userid>> returns <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|true>> if the user with ~I~D <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|userid>> is in
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|group>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="in_group"| value Db.Groups.in_group >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db.Groups >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|in~_group ~~groupid ~~userid>> returns <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|true>> if the user with ~I~D <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|userid>> is
      in the group with ~I~D <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|groupid>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="information_form"| value User_view.information_form >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User_view >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|information~_form ~~a ~~firstname ~~lastname ~~password~1 ~~password~2 ~(~)>> creates
    a ~P~O~S~T form to update the user information like first name~, last name and
    password~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="init"| value Core_db.init >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Core_db >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|init ~?host ~?port ~?user ~?password ~?database ~?unix~_domain~_socket~_dir ~?init ~(~)>>
    initializes the variables for the database access and register a
    function <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|init>> invoked each time a connection is created~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="initialize"| value Date.initialize >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Date >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~You can use <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|initialize timezone>> to communicate the client~'s
   timezone to the client when the auto~-initialization is disabled
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="is_complete"| value User.is_complete >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|is~_complete user>> returns <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|true>> if the first name and the last name of
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Types~.user>> have been completed yet~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="is_email_validated"| value User.is_email_validated >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|is~_email~_validated ~~userid ~~email>> returns whether for a user designated by
    its id the given email has been validated~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="is_email_validated"| value Db.User.is_email_validated >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db.User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|is~_email~_validated userid email>> returns <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|true>> if <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|email>> has been
      validated by the user with id <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|userid>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="is_email_validated"| value Current_user.is_email_validated >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Current_user >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|is~_email~_validated email>> returns <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|true>> if <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|email>> is a valided email for
    the current user~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="is_main_email"| value User.is_main_email >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|is~_main~_email ~~userid ~~email>> returns whether an email is the main email
    registered for a given user designated by its id~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="is_main_email"| value Db.User.is_main_email >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db.User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|is~_main~_email ~~email ~~userid>> returns <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|true>> if the main email of the
      user with ~I~D <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|userid>> is <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|email>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="is_main_email"| value Current_user.is_main_email >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Current_user >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|is~_main~_email email>> returns <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|true>> if <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|email>> is the main email of the current user~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="is_preregistered"| value User.is_preregistered >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|is~_preregistered email>> returns <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|true>> if a user exists with email
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|email>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="is_preregistered"| value Db.User.is_preregistered >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db.User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|is~_preregistered email>> returns <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|true>> if <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|email>> is already
      registered~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="is_registered"| value User.is_registered >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|is~_registered email>> returns <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|true>> if a user exists with email <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|email>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="is_registered"| value Db.User.is_registered >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db.User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|is~_registered email>> returns <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|true>> if the email is already registered~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="is_valid"| value Email.is_valid >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Email >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|is~_valid email>> returns <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|true>> if the e~-mail address <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|email>> is valid~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\J|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="js"| value Page.PAGE.js >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Page.PAGE >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|js>> corresponds to the ~Java~Script files to include into each page~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\L|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="language_of_user"| value User.language_of_user >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|language~_of~_user user>> returns the language of the user <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|user>>
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="lastname_of_user"| value User.lastname_of_user >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|lastname~_of~_user user>> returns the last name of the user <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|user>>
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="local_css"| value Page.PAGE.local_css >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Page.PAGE >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Use <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|local~_css>> instead of <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|css>> for local stylesheets if you are building
      a mobile application~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="local_from_calendar"| value Date.local_from_calendar >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Date >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Convert a <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Calendar~Lib~.~Calendar~.t>> value to a <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|local~_calendar>> value~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="local_js"| value Page.PAGE.local_js >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Page.PAGE >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Use <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|local~_js>> instead of <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|js>> for local scripts if you are building
      a mobile application~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="local_to_calendar"| value Date.local_to_calendar >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Date >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Convert a <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|local~_calendar>> value to a <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Calendar~Lib~.~Calendar~.t>> value~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="lwt_bind_input_enter"| value Lib.lwt_bind_input_enter >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Lib >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|lwt~_bound~_input~_enter inp f>> calls f whenever the user submits
    the contents of <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|inp>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="lwt_bound_input_enter"| value Lib.lwt_bound_input_enter >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Lib >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|lwt~_bound~_input~_enter f>> produces an input element bound to <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|f>>~,
    i~.e~.~, when the user submits the input~, we call <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|f>>~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\M|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="main_service"| value Services.main_service >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Services >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~The main service~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="make_page"| value Page.Make.make_page >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Page.Make >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Builds a valid html page from body content by adding headers
      for this app
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="max_identity_per_resource"| value Notif.ARG.max_identity_per_resource >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Notif.ARG >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="max_resource"| value Notif.ARG.max_resource >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Notif.ARG >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="memoizator"| value Lib.memoizator >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Lib >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|memoizator f ~(~)>> caches the returned value of <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|f ~(~)>>
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="message_id_of_success"| value Fcm_notif.Response.Results.message_id_of_success >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Response.Results >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|message~_id~_of~_success success>> returns a string specifying a unique
            ~I~D for each successfully processed message~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="msg"| value Msg.msg >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Msg >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Call this function either from client or server side
    to display an error message in the page~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="multicast_id_of_t"| value Fcm_notif.Response.multicast_id_of_t >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Response >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|multicast~_id~_of~_t response>> returns the unique ~I~D identifying the
        multicast message~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\N|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="name_of_group"| value Group.name_of_group >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Group >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|name~_of~_group group>> returns the group name~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="no_such_user"| value User.no_such_user >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Reference used to remember if a wrong user has already been typed~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="notify"| value Notif.S.notify >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Notif.S >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="now"| value Date.now >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Date >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|now ~(~)>> returns the current date as a <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|local~_calendar>> value~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\O|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="of_almost"| value Lib.Email_or_phone.of_almost >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Lib.Email_or_phone >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="of_string"| value Lib.Email_or_phone.Almost.of_string >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Lib.Email_or_phone.Almost >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="of_string"| value Lib.Email_or_phone.of_string >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Lib.Email_or_phone >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="on_connected_request"| value Session.on_connected_request >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Session >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Call this to add an action to be done at each connected request~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="on_denied_request"| value Session.on_denied_request >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Session >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Call this to add an action to be done just for each denied request~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="on_open_session"| value Session.on_open_session >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Session >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Call this to add an action to be done just after opening a session
    ~The function takes the user id as parameter~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="on_post_close_session"| value Session.on_post_close_session >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Session >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Call this to add an action to be done just after closing the session
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="on_pre_close_session"| value Session.on_pre_close_session >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Session >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Call this to add an action to be done just before closing the session
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="on_request"| value Session.on_request >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Session >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Call this to add an action to be done just before handling a request
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="on_start_connected_process"| value Session.on_start_connected_process >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Session >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Call this to add an action to be done
    when the process starts in connected mode~, or when the user logs in
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="on_start_process"| value Session.on_start_process >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Session >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Call this to add an action to be done on server side
    when the process starts
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="on_start_unconnected_process"| value Session.on_start_unconnected_process >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Session >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Call this to add an action to be done on server side
    when the process starts but only when not in connected mode
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="on_unconnected_request"| value Session.on_unconnected_request >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Session >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Call this to add an action to be done at each unconnected request~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="other_head"| value Page.PAGE.other_head >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Page.PAGE >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|other~_head>> is a list of custom elements to add in the head section~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\P|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="page"| value Page.Make.page >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Page.Make >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Default wrapper for service handler generating pages~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="password_form"| value User_view.password_form >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User_view >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|password~_form ~~a ~~service ~(~)>> defines a ~P~O~S~T form with two inputs for a
    password form ~(password and password confirmation~) and a send button~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="password_set"| value User.password_set >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|password~_set userid>> returns <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|true>> if the user with ~I~D <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|userid>> has set
    a password~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="phone_regexp"| value Lib.phone_regexp >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Lib >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="prepare"| value Notif.ARG.prepare >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Notif.ARG >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="preregister_form"| value User_view.preregister_form >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User_view >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|preregister~_form ~~a label>> creates a <<a_api subproject="server" | val User_view.generic_email_form >> with the service
    <<a_api subproject="server" | val Services.preregister_service >> and add the label <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|label>> to the email
    input form~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="preregister_handler"| value Handlers.preregister_handler >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Handlers >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|preregister~_handler ~(~) email>> preregisters the email <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|email>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="preregister_service"| value Services.preregister_service >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Services >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A ~P~O~S~T service to preregister a user~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="pwd_crypt_ref"| value Db.pwd_crypt_ref >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|pwd~_crypt~_ref>> is a reference to <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~(f~_crypt~, f~_check~)>> where <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|f~_crypt pwd>> is used to encrypt the password <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|pwd>>~.~, <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|f~_check userid pwd hashed~_pwd>> returns <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|true>> if the hash of <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|pwd>> and
    the hashed password <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|hashed~_pwd>> of the user with id <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|userid>> match~. ~If they
    don~'t match~, it returns <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|false>>~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\R|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="record_image"| value Uploader.record_image >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Uploader >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|record~_image directory ~?ratio ~?cropping~:~(top~, right~, bottom~, left~) file>>
    crops the image like <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|crop~_image>> and save it in the directory <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|directory>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="register_settings_service"| value Services.register_settings_service >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Services >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Register the settings service ~(defined in the app rather than in
    the ~O~S lib~) because we need to perform redirections to it~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="registration_id_of_success"| value Fcm_notif.Response.Results.registration_id_of_success >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Response.Results >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|registration~_id~_of~_t result>> returns a string specifying the
            canonical registration token for the client app that the message was
            processed and sent to~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="remove_email_from_user"| value User.remove_email_from_user >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|remove~_email~_from~_user ~~userid ~~email>> removes the email <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|email>> from the
    user with the id <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|userid>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="remove_email_from_user"| value Db.User.remove_email_from_user >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db.User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|remove~_email~_from~_user ~~userid ~~email>> removes the email <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|email>> from the
      emails list of user with ~I~D <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|userid>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="remove_email_from_user"| value Current_user.remove_email_from_user >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Current_user >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|remove~_email~_from~_user email>> removes the email <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|email>> of the current
    user~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="remove_preregister"| value User.remove_preregister >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|remove~_preregister email>> removes an email from the preregister
    collections~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="remove_preregister"| value Db.User.remove_preregister >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db.User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|remove~_preregister email>> removes <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|email>> from the database~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="remove_user_in_group"| value Group.remove_user_in_group >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Group >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|remove~_user~_in~_group ~~group ~~userid>> removes the user with ~I~D <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|userid>> from
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|group>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="remove_user_in_group"| value Db.Groups.remove_user_in_group >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db.Groups >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|remove~_user~_in~_group ~~groupid ~~userid>> removes the user with ~I~D <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|userid>>
      in the group with ~I~D <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|groupid>>
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="request_code"| value Connect_phone.request_code >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Connect_phone >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Send a validation code for a new e~-mail address ~(corresponds to
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|confirm~_code~_signup>> and <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|confirm~_code~_extra>>~)~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="request_recovery_code"| value Connect_phone.request_recovery_code >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Connect_phone >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Send a validation code for recovering an existing address~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="reset"| value Request_cache.Cache_sig.reset >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Request_cache.Cache_sig >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Remove a <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|value>> for the given key~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="reset_tips"| value Tips.reset_tips >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Tips >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Call this function to reset tips for current user~.
>>
|
