|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="reset_tips_link"| value User_view.reset_tips_link >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User_view >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Link to start to see the help from the beginning~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="reset_tips_service"| value Tips.reset_tips_service >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Tips >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A non~-attached service that will reset tips~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="resize_image"| value Uploader.resize_image >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Uploader >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Resize the given image ~(<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|src>>~) and save it to <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|dst>> ~(default is the source
   file~)~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="results_of_t"| value Fcm_notif.Response.results_of_t >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Response >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|results~_of~_t response>> returns the status of the messages processed~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\S|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="send"| value Fcm_notif.send >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|send server~_key notification options>>
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="send"| value Email.send >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Email >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Send an e~-mail to <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|to~_addrs>> from <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|from~_addr>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="set"| value Request_cache.Cache_sig.set >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Request_cache.Cache_sig >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Set the corresponding <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|value>> for a key~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="set_connection_wrapper"| value Core_db.set_connection_wrapper >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Core_db >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="set_default_duration"| value Msg.set_default_duration >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Msg >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Set default message duration ~(default ~4s~)
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="set_email_validated"| value Db.User.set_email_validated >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db.User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|set~_email~_validated userid email>> valids <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|email>> for the user with id
      <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|userid>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="set_from_addr"| value Email.set_from_addr >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Email >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|set~_from~_addr ~(sender~_name~, sender~_email~)>> sets the email address used to
    send mail to <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|sender~_email>> and the sender name to <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|sender~_name>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="set_mailer"| value Email.set_mailer >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Email >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|set~_mailer mailer>> sets the name of the external <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|sendmail>> program on your
    system~, used by the default <<a_api subproject="server" | val Email.send >> function~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="set_password_handler"| value Handlers.set_password_handler >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Handlers >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|set~_password~_handler userid ~(~) ~(password~, confirmation~_password~)>> updates
    the password of the user with ~I~D <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|userid>> with the hashed value of
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|password>> if <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|confirmation~_password>> corresponds to <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|password>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="set_password_service"| value Services.set_password_service >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Services >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A ~P~O~S~T service to update the password~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="set_personal_data_handler"| value Handlers.set_personal_data_handler >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Handlers >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|set~_personal~_data~_handler userid ~(~) ~(~(firstname~, lastname~)~, ~(password~,
    confirmation~_password~)~)>> sets the corresponding data to given values~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="set_personal_data_service"| value Services.set_personal_data_service >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Services >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A ~P~O~S~T service to update the basic user data like first name~, last name and
    password~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="set_pwd_crypt_fun"| value User.set_pwd_crypt_fun >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~By default~, passwords are encrypted using ~Bcrypt~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="set_send"| value Email.set_send >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Email >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Customize email sending function~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="set_send_sms_handler"| value Connect_phone.set_send_sms_handler >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Connect_phone >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|set~_send~_sms~_handler f>> registers <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|f>> as the function to be
    called to send ~S~M~S messages~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="set_tip_seen"| value Tips.set_tip_seen >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Tips >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Call this function to mark a tip as "already seen" by current user~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="sign_up_form"| value User_view.sign_up_form >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User_view >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|sign~_up~_form ~?a ~?email ~(~)>> creates a <<a_api subproject="server" | val User_view.generic_email_form >> with the service
    <<a_api subproject="server" | val Services.sign_up_service >>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="sign_up_handler"| value Handlers.sign_up_handler >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Handlers >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|sign~_up~_handler ~(~) email>> signes up an user with email <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|email>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="sign_up_service"| value Services.sign_up_service >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Services >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A ~P~O~S~T service to sign up with only an email address~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="signout"| value Icons.ICSIG.signout >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Icons.ICSIG >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="smart_date"| value Date.smart_date >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Date >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|smart~_date ~~now local~_date>> returns a smart description of <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|local~_date>>
    comparing to <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|now>> ~(default value of now is the current time when the
    function is called~)~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="smart_date_interval"| value Date.smart_date_interval >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Date >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|smart~_date~_interval ~?now start~_date end~_date>> returns a smart description
    of <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|start~_date>> comparing to <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|end~_date>> of the year~, month and day
    ~(compared to <<a_api subproject="server" | val Date.smart_interval >>~, no information about the hour and
    minutes is given~)~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="smart_hours_minutes"| value Date.smart_hours_minutes >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Date >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|smart~_hours~_minutes date>> returns the time in the format <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|"~%~I~:~%~M~%~P">>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="smart_interval"| value Date.smart_interval >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Date >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|smart~_interval ~?now start~_date end~_date>> returns a smart description of
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|start~_date>> comparing to <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|end~_date>> of the year~, month~, day~, hour and
    minutes ~(compared to <<a_api subproject="server" | val Date.smart_date_interval >>~, information about the hour and
    minutes is given~)~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="smart_time"| value Date.smart_time >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Date >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|smart~_time ~~now date>> returns a smart description of
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|local~_date>> comparing to <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|now>> ~(default value of now is the current time
    when the function is called~)~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="string_filter"| value Lib.string_filter >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Lib >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="string_of_error"| value Fcm_notif.Response.Results.string_of_error >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Response.Results >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|string~_of~_error error>> returns a string representation of the
            error <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|error>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="string_of_stream"| value Lib.Http.string_of_stream >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Lib.Http >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|string~_of~_stream ~?len stream>> creates a string of maximum length <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|len>>
        ~(default is <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~1~6~3~8~4>>~) from the stream <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|stream>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="string_of_t"| value Platform.string_of_t >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Platform >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="string_repeat"| value Lib.string_repeat >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Lib >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="success_of_t"| value Fcm_notif.Response.success_of_t >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Response >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|success~_of~_t response>> returns the number of messages that were
        processed without an error~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\T|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="t_of_string"| value Platform.t_of_string >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Platform >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="tip_seen"| value Tips.tip_seen >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Tips >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Returns whether a tip has been seen or not~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="title"| value Page.PAGE.title >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Page.PAGE >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|title>> corresponds to the html tag ~<title~>~, it will be inserted on all
      pages~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="to_json"| value Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap.Action.to_json >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap.Action >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="to_json"| value Fcm_notif.Data.to_json >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Data >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="to_json"| value Fcm_notif.Notification.to_json >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Notification >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="to_list"| value Fcm_notif.Options.to_list >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Options >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|to~_list option>> returns the representation of the options as a list of
        tuples <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~(option~_name~, json~_value~)>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="to_list"| value Fcm_notif.Data.to_list >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Data >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|to~_list data>> returns the representation of the data as a list of
        tuples <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~(data~_key~, json~_value~)>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="to_local"| value Date.to_local >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Date >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Convert any type of calendar to a local calendar~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="to_local_date"| value Date.to_local_date >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Date >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Convert a <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|local~_calendar>> value to a <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Calendar~Lib~.~Date~.t>> value~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="to_local_time"| value Date.to_local_time >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Date >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Convert a <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|local~_calendar>> value to a <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Calendar~Lib~.~Time~.t>> value~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="to_string"| value Lib.Email_or_phone.Almost.to_string >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Lib.Email_or_phone.Almost >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="to_string"| value Lib.Email_or_phone.to_string >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Lib.Email_or_phone >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="to_utc"| value Date.to_utc >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Date >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Convert a local calendar to a ~U~T~C calendar~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\U|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="unknown_timezone"| value Date.unknown_timezone >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Date >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|unknown~_timezone ~(~)>> returns <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|true>> if the timezone is unknown~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="unlisten_user"| value Notif.S.unlisten_user >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Notif.S >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Make a user stop listening on data <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|key>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="unset_tip_seen"| value Tips.unset_tip_seen >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Tips >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Counterpart of set~_tip~_seen~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="update"| value User.update >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|update ~?password ~?avatar ~?language ~~firstname ~~lastname userid>> update the
    given information of the user with ~I~D <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|userid>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="update"| value Db.User.update >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db.User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|update ~?password ~?avatar ~?language ~~firstname ~~lastname userid>> updates the user
      profile with <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|userid>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="update'"| value User.update' >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Another version of <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|update>> using a type <<a_api subproject="server" | type Types.User.t >> instead of
    label~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="update_avatar"| value User.update_avatar >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|update~_avatar ~~userid ~~avatar>> updates the avatar of the user with ~I~D
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|userid>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="update_avatar"| value Db.User.update_avatar >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db.User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|update~_avatar ~~userid ~~avatar>> updates the avatar of the user
      with ~I~D <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|userid>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="update_language"| value User.update_language >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|update~_language ~~userid ~~language>> updates the language of the user with ~I~D
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|userid>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="update_language"| value Db.User.update_language >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db.User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|update~_language ~~userid ~~language>> updates the language of the user with
      ~I~D <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|userid>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="update_language"| value Current_user.update_language >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Current_user >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|update~_language language>> updates the language of the current user~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="update_language_service"| value Services.update_language_service >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Services >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A ~P~O~S~T service to update the language of the current user~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="update_main_email"| value User.update_main_email >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|update~_mail~_email ~~userid ~~email>> sets the main email for a user with the
    ~I~D <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|userid>> as the email <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|email>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="update_main_email"| value Db.User.update_main_email >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db.User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|update~_main~_email ~~userid ~~email>> updates the main email of the user
      with ~I~D <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|userid>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="update_main_email"| value Current_user.update_main_email >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Current_user >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|update~_main~_email email>> sets the main email of the current user to
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|email>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="update_password"| value User.update_password >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|update~_password ~~userid ~~password>> updates the password only~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="update_password"| value Db.User.update_password >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db.User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|update~_password ~~userid ~~new~_password>> updates the password of the user
      with ~I~D <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|userid>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="upload_pic_link"| value User_view.upload_pic_link >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User_view >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|upload~_pic~_link ~?a ~?content ~?crop ~?input ~?submit action~_after~_submit
    service userid>>
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="user"| value Icons.ICSIG.user >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Icons.ICSIG >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="user_already_exists"| value User.user_already_exists >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Reference used to remember if the user already exists~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="user_already_preregistered"| value User.user_already_preregistered >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Reference used to remember if the user is already preregistered~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="user_box"| value User_view.user_box >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User_view >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Return <<a_api subproject="server" | val User_view.connection_box >> if no user is connected ~(i~.e~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="user_does_not_exist"| value User.user_does_not_exist >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Reference used to remember if the user exists~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="user_indep_process_scope"| value Session.user_indep_process_scope >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Session >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="user_indep_session_scope"| value Session.user_indep_session_scope >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Session >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="user_indep_state_hierarchy"| value Session.user_indep_state_hierarchy >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Session >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="user_of_userid"| value User.user_of_userid >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|user~_of~_userid userid>> returns the information about the user with ~I~D
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|userid>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="user_of_userid"| value Db.User.user_of_userid >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db.User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|user~_of~_userid userid>> returns a tuple <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~(userid~, firstname~, lastname~,
      avatar~, bool~_password~, language~)>> describing the information about
      the user with ~I~D <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|userid>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="user_tz"| value Date.user_tz >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Date >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|user~_tz ~(~)>> returns current user~'s timezone~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="userid"| value Db.Phone.userid >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db.Phone >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~The user corresponding to a phone number ~(if any~)~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="userid_of_email"| value User.userid_of_email >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|userid~_of~_email email>> returns the userid of the user with email <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|email>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="userid_of_email"| value Db.User.userid_of_email >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db.User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|userid~_of~_email email>> returns the userid of the user which has the email
      <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|email>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="userid_of_user"| value User.userid_of_user >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|userid~_of~_user user>> returns the userid of the user <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|user>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="username"| value User_view.username >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User_view >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|username user>> creates a div with class <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|"os~_username">> containing~: <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|firstname>> <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|lastname>> if the user has a firstname~.~, <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|"~User ">> concatenated with the userid in other cases~.
    ~F~I~X~M~E~/~I~M~P~R~O~V~E~M~E~: use an option for the case the user has no firstname~?
    ~Firstname must be empty because it must be optional~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\V|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="verify_password"| value User.verify_password >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|verify~_password ~~email ~~password>> returns the userid if user with email
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|email>> is registered with the password <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|password>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="verify_password"| value Db.User.verify_password >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db.User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|verify~_password ~~email ~~password>> returns the userid if user with email
      <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|email>> is registered with the password <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|password>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="verify_password_phone"| value Db.User.verify_password_phone >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db.User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|verify~_password~_phone ~~number ~~password>>
      returns the userid if user
      who owns <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|number>> and whose password is <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|password>>~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\W|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="without_transaction"| value Core_db.without_transaction >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Core_db >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|without~_transaction f>> executes function <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|f>> outside a database
    transaction~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="wrong_password"| value User.wrong_password >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Reference used to remember if a wrong password has been already typed~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="wrong_pdata"| value Msg.wrong_pdata >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Msg >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~(~(firstname~, lastname~)~, ~(password~, password~_confirmation~)~) option>>
    is a reference used to remember information about the user during a
    request when something went wrong ~(for example in a form when the password
    and password confirmation are not the same~)~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\Y|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="y"| value Lib.Email_or_phone.Almost.y >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Lib.Email_or_phone.Almost >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="y"| value Lib.Email_or_phone.y >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Lib.Email_or_phone >>~]||
\\
